ideas.title: Grace In The Machine
ideas.cleanSummary: A seed about finding grace inside systems, technology, automation, or mechanical processes.
ideas.notes: Human clarification may help define whether this is about AI, technology, systems, or spiritual providence.

ideas.title: Courting Disappointment
ideas.cleanSummary: A seed about expectations, desire, and the way misplaced attachment can invite disappointment.
ideas.notes: Needs human clarification on the intended story or angle.

ideas.title: Hum_Aw
ideas.rawText: Have both a sense of humor and a sense of awe. BOTH are needed in rich engagement = “Hum_Aw
ideas.cleanSummary: A seed about holding humor and awe together as two necessary ingredients for deep engagement with life.
ideas.notes: Potential wordplay may need Fred's preferred spelling and pronunciation.

ideas.title: Work The Equation
ideas.cleanSummary: A seed about doing the work, respecting process, and participating in the equation rather than wishing for outcomes.

ideas.title: See It And Forget It
ideas.rawText: See it and forget it. (The strength from growing in the dark) https://youtu.be/psQG45WmWuQ?si=tWD8RwccNRbYUZbH
ideas.cleanSummary: A seed about hidden growth, unseen strength, and the value of formation that happens away from public attention.
ideas.notes: Source video should be reviewed before use.

ideas.title: Stayin' Alive
ideas.rawText:
Stayin’ Alive
I did a CPR (Cardio Pulmonary Rescesitaition) class and learned so many good things. Stayin’ Alive song is the rhythm or tempo to pump the chest. I imagine never knew their song would save lives. Something about heart or rhythm. Also, the thing “arrested” in a cardiac arrest is the rhythm of the heartbeat.
ideas.cleanSummary: A seed connecting CPR, rhythm, the song Stayin' Alive, and the idea that the right rhythm can help preserve life.
ideas.notes: May need fact-checking around CPR wording and song reference before publication.

ideas.title: Leverage Your Losses
ideas.cleanSummary: A seed about turning loss into wisdom, maturity, and usable strength.

ideas.title: Like A Rock
ideas.rawText:
Like a Rock
The relationship between the “words of Jesus“ and “your engagement with those words“ had not been diminished… They seemed to only be made more prominent, like a solid rock that’s been more revealed after multiple storms. I’ve washed away the topsoil debris and shrubs.
ideas.cleanSummary: A seed about storms revealing rather than weakening the solid ground of Jesus' words.
ideas.notes: May connect more directly to Jesus' teaching than Proverbs; preserve for later discernment.

ideas.title: Risk Take – Miss Take – This Take
ideas.rawText:
Risk take – Miss take – This take
The idea behind this is that you have to take a risk and you all calves must fail until you. FIND the one and only way… Think about the inventor of the lightbulb. Story of building Proverbs daily app was that I made so many mistakes that when it came time to rebuild it, I knew what to do because I had done it wrong so many ways that I knew what not to do! I “miss – taked” my way to the right take
ideas.cleanSummary: A seed about learning through failed attempts until mistakes become the map toward the right take.
ideas.notes: Raw text includes unclear phrase 'you all calves must fail until you'; preserve for human review.

ideas.title: Cheep Speech Ain't Free
ideas.rawText:
Cheep Speech Ain’t Free…that’s gonna cost you 
https://youtu.be/0Ndd2N8VFgQ?si=Fg8ZVVdp8UKhF5Hy
ideas.cleanSummary: A seed about speech that seems cheap but carries real cost and consequence.
ideas.notes: Human clarification needed on whether 'Cheep' is intentional wordplay or should be 'Cheap'. Source video should be reviewed before use.

ideas.title: Make The World A Better Place
ideas.rawText:
Make the world a better place.
“My wife and I have a joke… That good loving can make the world a better place“ really dealing with my reference also a good cup of coffee for a person that loves coffee in the morning is gonna make the world a better place for everywhere that person goes. Play with that.
ideas.cleanSummary: A seed about small forms of goodness, love, and delight changing the atmosphere people carry into the world.
ideas.notes: May need tone review depending on how personal the marriage reference should be in a public devotional.
